title: OpenClaw internal/webchat command auth inherited wildcard ownerAllowFrom across channels
description: In resolveOwnerAllowFromList() a channel-prefixed ownerAllowFrom entry (e.g. 'discord:owner') is only skipped when params.providerId is set AND differs from the entry's channel. On internal and webchat command paths params.providerId is left unset, so the guard 'params.providerId && channel !== params.providerId' short-circuits to false, the 'continue' is not taken, and the channel-scoped owner allowlist entry is accepted regardless of which channel it was scoped to. This lets owner/wildcard ownerAllowFrom state leak across channel boundaries, granting owner-style command authorization to internal/webchat senders that should remain channel-scoped (CWE-863 Incorrect Authorization).
